chunks.text: HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Civil Transfer Application No.12 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For orders on C.M.A No.1142/2026 (U/A) 23.04.2026 Mr.Masood Illahi Sahito, Advocate for applicant Respondent-Shahzad Gul is present in person ********* Urgency is granted. This Civil Transfer Application has been filed by Ghulam Abbas, who is the defendant in Summary Suit No. 02 of 2025, pending before the Court of the learned Additional District Judge, Hala, District Matiari. Learned counsel for the applicant contends that the respondent/plaintiff, Shahzad Gul, is a practicing Advocate who is also enrolled as member of District Bar Association, Matiari. Learned counsel submits that the applicant would be satisfied if the said summary suit is transferred from the Court of the learned Additional District Judge, Hala to the District Judge, Matiari. Counsel jointly submits that leave to defend has already been decided and the applicant/defendant was granted unconditional leave to defend. Both parties inform that the summary suit stands at the stage of recording of evidence. The respondent/ plaintiff, who is an Advocate, contends that he has no objection to the adjudication of the matter before any competent Court and reposes confidence in all Courts. Given the above, Summary Suit No. 02 of 2025 is transferred from the Court of the learned Additional District Judge, Hala, to the District Judge, Matiari, for disposal in accordance with law. This Civil Transfer Application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
